title: Twilight Crossbow
description: Turn The Twilight Forest 's Bow to Crossbow!
body:
## Twilight Crossbow

![Twilight Crossbow Logo](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_89bec18a-b85f-4329-a58d-577661a77873.png)

This mod requires the Twilight Forest mod and the Just Enough Items mod is recommended in order to see the Crossbow recipes.

This is an addon mod for Twilight Forest that adds Crossbow versions of the Bows from the mod.

You can find Crossbow Smithing Templates in the Aurora Palace in the Twilight Forest.

Make Triple Crossbow with a Crossbow Smithing Template, Gold and a Triple Bow.

Make Ice Crossbow with a Crossbow Smithing Template, an Ice Block and an Ice Bow.

Make Seeker Crossbow with a Crossbow Smithing Template, an Steleef and an Seeker Bow.

also snow guardian usable crossbow(Include Twilight Crossbow mod one)

### Triple CrossBow

![Triple Bow With FireWork](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_351db741-971a-4b75-9ad7-c0e267b5931c.png)

like Original Triple Bow. You can Even shoot more Firework!

and don't forget Triple Bow With Piece Enchant…

### Ice CrossBow

![Ice CrossBow](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_ccad2025-6ebf-443d-aa79-3326931762db.png)

This Crossbow make Freeze Enemy when Arrow Hit.

And When Use Firework. Firework Explosion will make freeze enemy!
